description: You are processing a weekly pallet of laptops sent to the 'Hardware Triage' location. Some laptops are dead and need their components harvested before being sent to e-waste, while others are perfectly healthy and just need to be relocated. Create a new Status Label named 'Pending E-Waste' with the type 'Archived'. For the unrepairable laptops at 'Hardware Triage' currently marked 'Out for Repair' (Tags: TRG-001, TRG-002, TRG-003), check in all components (RAM and SSDs) to the inventory pool and update their status to 'Pending E-Waste'. For the healthy laptops at 'Hardware Triage' marked 'Ready to Deploy' (Tags: TRG-004, TRG-005), update their Default Location to 'Boston HQ' while ensuring their components remain attached.
